use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons on landing pages and marketing sites
Form submission and action triggers in web applications
Navigation action buttons with multiple visual variants
Destructive action buttons for delete or warning operations
Secondary and ghost button variants for contextual UI actions
ai_summary: A reusable button component with multiple style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options, built with class-variance-authority for consistent variant management and Radix UI's Slot for flexible composition. Features standard Tailwind focus rings and hover states for accessibility.
